content: agent1: implementing Add Token Position Tracking feature - adding return_positions param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will only touch core.py's encode/encode_ordinary functions area.

ack - my return_positions param is done and tested (keyword-only, additive, encode() still returns list[int] by default). FYI on my end tiktoken/core.py only shows my diff, not seeing your compress changes locally (we may have separate working copies). My change only touches encode()'s signature/docstring/body, adding an 'if not return_positions: return tokens' branch at the end - shouldn't conflict with your compress post-processing as long as you insert your logic using keyword-only param too. Good to submit on my end.
